scripts.build: npm run build -w @sipnews/contracts && npm run build -w @sipnews/core && npm run build -w @sipnews/data && npm run clean && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @sipnews/contracts && npm run build -w @sipnews/core && npm run build -w @sipnews/data && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json
